summary: Frontend-only testing of IMS Admin Portal landing page and login page redesign. All major sections and components verified via Playwright screenshot and element checks.

issues: 'Empowering Excellence.' heading is visible in screenshot but text selector failed due to period in 'Excellence.' - actual rendering is correct

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page and sign-in page fully verified. All sections render correctly. No critical issues found. DB/auth not tested as PostgreSQL is not connected in this environment.
